results.rendered_html:
rāṣṭriya (von rāṣṭra)
1〉 adj. im Reich geboren, zum Reich gehörig  P. 4,2,93 . Schol. zu  P. 4,3,25 . anya˚ (von anyarāṣṭra)  KĀṬH. 37,11 .
— 2〉 m. Schwager des Königs in der Bühnensprache  AK. 1,1,7,14 .  H. 333 .  KĀṬ. _zu_ ŚĀK. 73,1 .  MṚCCH. 66,23 . 154,11 . 175,5 . ˚śyāla dass. 138,18 . raṭṭia im Prākrit  ŚĀK. 79,2 .
— Vgl. rāṣṭrīya.

results.rendered_html:
rāṣṭriya a. [rāṣṭre bhavaḥ gha] Belonging to a kingdom.
— yaḥ
1 The ruler of a kingdom, king; as in rāṣṭriyaśyālaḥ  Mk. 9. 
2 The brother-in-law of a king (queen's brother); śrutaṃ rāṣṭriyamukhādyāvadaṃgulīyakadarśanam  Ś. 6.  (Also rāṣṭrīya).
